notes: Early data ~3 weeks after the 2026-05-22 release: community compilation of 5,000+ packs (@switchstock relayed by PokeCottage / Joseph Writer Anderson) plus the TCGplayer pull-rates article. Per-pack odds: double rare 1/5 and ultra rare 1/12 in the rare slot; illustration rare 1/9 (11 cards), special illustration rare 1/90 (6 cards) and Mega Hyper Rare 1/1100 (modeled as hyper-rare, single card: Mega Greninja ex; reported estimates range 1/1000-1/1786) replacing the second reverse-holo slot. Confidence medium because top-end rates are still preliminary. Reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card.
